package telemetry

import (
	"log"
	"time"
)

type Telemetry struct {
	ID        string
	Value     float64
	Timestamp time.Time
}

type TelemetryWriter struct {
	workers    chan chan Telemetry
	numWorkers int
	maxRetries int
}

func NewTelemetryWriter(numWorkers, maxRetries int) *TelemetryWriter {
	tw := &TelemetryWriter{
		numWorkers: numWorkers,
		maxRetries: maxRetries,
		workers:    make(chan chan Telemetry, numWorkers),
	}

	// Initialize worker pool
	for i := 0; i < numWorkers; i++ {
		worker := &worker{
			id:          i,
			tw:          tw,
			taskQueue:   make(chan Telemetry),
			quitChan:    make(chan bool),
		}
		tw.workers <- worker.taskQueue
		go worker.start()
	}

	return tw
}

func (tw *TelemetryWriter) HandleBatch(records []Telemetry) {
	for _, record := range records {
		taskQueue := <-tw.workers
		taskQueue <- record
		tw.workers <- taskQueue // Return queue to pool
	}
}

type worker struct {
	id          int
	tw          *TelemetryWriter
	taskQueue   chan Telemetry
	quitChan    chan bool
}

func (w *worker) start() {
	for {

			}
		case <-w.quitChan:
			return
		}
	}
}

func (w *worker) writeWithRetry(record Telemetry) error {

		if err = w.write(record); err == nil {
			return nil
		}
		log.Printf("Write failed (attempt %d/%d): %v", i+1, w.tw.maxRetries, err)
		time.Sleep(time.Millisecond * 100 << uint(i)) // Exponential backoff
	}
	return err
}

	return nil
}
